Our Journey

Milestones

2014

Company Founded

Raysun Biopharma established in Vientiane, Laos

2016

Factory Completed

12,000 sqm state-of-the-art manufacturing facility completed

2017

GMP Certification

Achieved WHO GMP certification for all production lines

2019

Product Expansion

Expanded softgel and tablet production capabilities

2021

ISO Certification

Quality Management System certified to ISO 9001:2015

2023

Regional Expansion

Expanded distribution to Thailand, Cambodia, and Myanmar

2025

Global Presence

Serving patients across multiple countries worldwide

Leadership

Governance

Our leadership team brings extensive experience in pharmaceutical manufacturing, quality assurance, and regulatory affairs. Comprehensive leadership information is available upon official release.

Leadership information available upon official release

Global Presence

Serving Healthcare Needs Worldwide

Our products reach patients across Southeast Asia, the Middle East, and Africa. We maintain strategic partnerships with distributors in each region to ensure reliable access to quality medicines.

Laos
Thailand
Cambodia
Vietnam
Myanmar
Middle East
Africa
